import io
import string

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let t = y
    y = x % y
    x = t
  end
  x
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut nums = [0, 0]
mut count = 0
mut current = 0
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  else
    if in_num
      if count < 2
        nums = nums.set
      end
      # store
      if count == 0
        nums = [current, 0]
      else if count == 1
        let first = match nums.get(0)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = [first, current]
      end
      count = count + 1
      current = 0
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  if count == 0
    nums = [current, 0]
  else if count == 1
    let first = match nums.get(0)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = [first, current]
  end
  count = count + 1
end

let a = match nums.get(0)
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end
let b = match nums.get(1)
when Some(v)
  v
when None

end

let g = gcd(a, b)
